# Capital Markets — Regulatory Constraints

| Regulation           | Key Requirement                                          |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| MiFID II / MiFIR     | Best execution, transparency, trade & transaction report |
| EMIR (EU 648/2012)   | Mandatory clearing, bilateral margin, TR reporting       |
| MAR (EU 596/2014)    | Market abuse prevention; insider information walls       |
| CSDR (EU 909/2014)   | Settlement discipline; buy-in obligations; cash penalties|
| Dodd-Frank (US)      | Swap dealer registration; SDR trade reporting            |
| SFTR (EU 2365/2015)  | Securities Financing Transaction transparency reporting  |
| FRTB (CRR II)        | SA-TB and IMA for trading book capital requirements      |
| SFDR (EU 2019/2088)  | ESG sustainability disclosure for managed funds          |
| Securitisation Reg   | STS framework; risk retention 5% minimum                 |
